description: This component is able to take a taskID of a migration on the cloud, and is able to display the information about said Migration. This info is grabbed from a AccountMigrationTask object internally which is returned by the SkyFrost API.

fields.TaskId: A UUID of a task that has been done, waiting, or is being done on the SkyFrost cloud.
fields.Exists: Whether ``TaskId`` is a valid ID for a task on the cloud
fields.Name: The name of the found migration task.
fields.Description: The description of the task. Usually starts with "Account Migration" or "Favorites migration"
fields.State: Also known as "Status", this will show whether the task has started, and if it's done or currently running.
fields.EstimatedQueuePosition: An estimate of the migration task's position on the list of migrations the SkyFrost servers are currently doing. This number can be high if a huge influx of migrations is happening at the current time.
fields.CreatedOn: When the migration task was submitted to the list of migrations to be done on the cloud
fields.StartedOn: When the cloud started to migrate the items for this task.
fields.CompletedOn: When the Cloud completed this migration task.
fields.RecordsPerMinute: A calculation average of how fast the SkyFrost cloud is transfering items from the source platform to Resonite.
fields.CurrentlyMigrating: What type of thing the cloud is currently migrating?
fields.CurrentItem: What item the cloud is currently migrating for this task.
fields.TotalRecordCount: How many records this migration task is to migrate in total.
fields.TotalMigratedRecordCount: How many records this migration has successfully migrated so far.
fields.TotalFailedRecordCount: How many records this migration failed to migrate.
fields.TotalMigratedVariableCount: How many Cloud Variables that the user has created themselves that this migration task has to migrate in total.
fields.TotalMigratedVariableDefinitionCount: How many Cloud Variable Definitions this migration task has to migrate in total.
fields.TotalContactCount: How many friend connections that this migration task has to migrate in total.
fields.MigratedContactCount: How many friend connections that this migration task has migrated so far.
fields.MigratedMessageCount: How many messages sent by the user that this migration task has migrated so far.
fields.TotalGroupCount: How many groups that the user has created that this migration task has to migrate in total.
fields.MigratedGroupCount: How many groups that the user has created that the migration task has migrated so far.
fields.TotalMigratedMemberCount: How many member names of groups that the user has created has been migrated by the migration task.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: does not work outside of user space.
